text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed as rev 1.7 and merged onto RELENG_4 as rev 1.2.2.4, thanks. 

Most of the problems fixed were my own fault, so it's probably not 
worth checking the NTP distribution for corresponding problems to 
submit back to the NTP distribution maintainer.
